analysis.consistency: Consistent with typical high-level class features in terms of power scaling, though the trigger (initiative roll with 0 ki) is somewhat niche.
analysis.quality: The quality is high; it's a clean, straightforward feature that solves a common late-game resource management issue for the Monk (running out of Ki). It provides a small, reliable burst of resources when needed most (start of combat).

mechanics.trigger: Roll for initiative AND have no ki points remaining.
mechanics.balance_assessment: Appropriate for a 20th-level capstone ability. It's not game-breaking but significantly improves the Monk's opening turn if they entered combat depleted. 4 Ki points is substantial enough to make an impact (e.g., Stunning Strike + bonus action attack).

analysis.archivist_notes: This feature directly addresses the Monk's primary weakness (Ki reliance/scarcity) at the very end of the progression path. Mechanically sound and fits the theme of mastering their internal energy.
